headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on FedEx, Raises Price Target to $424
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Brian Ossenbeck   maintains FedEx (NYSE:FDX) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $294 to $424.

headline: The Next Internet Power Move: Companies Have Until August 2026 to Secure Their Own Domain Names
summary: LONDON, March 10, 2026--Companies have a limited window between April and August 2026 to secure their own brand name at the top level of the internet, according to global ICANN-accredited domain registrar, Com Laude.

headline: Investing $1,000 in FedEx or UPS a Decade Ago Would Have Garnered How Much?
summary: FedEx (NYSE: FDX) and United Parcel Service (NYSE: UPS) have long served as proxies for the American economy. When packages move, consumers are spending and businesses are shipping. But over the past several years, these two logistics titans have taken sharply different paths, and the results for investors could not be more divergent. FedEx spent ...
